'''Allied Life Inc.''' or '''ALI''' was an insurance company that offered pilot's life insurance policies. An ALI agent named [[Leed Quarrezz]] sent a message offering the policy to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

{{Company-stub}}
